# UiHost.ChannelPhase enumeration

The phases of the dialect channel's lifecycle, from the UI's perspective.

```csharp
public enum ChannelPhase
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| AwaitingInitResponse | `0` | The UI has sent (or is about to send) `ui/initialize` and is waiting for the host's response. |
| Initialized | `1` | The init response has arrived; the UI may now send any subsequent dialect message. |
